mapper.select: SELECT 'electric' AS meterType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mt_electric_archive UNION ALL SELECT 'water', COUNT(*) FROM mt_water_archive UNION ALL SELECT 'heat', COUNT(*) FROM mt_heat_archive UNION ALL SELECT 'gas', COUNT(*) FROM mt_gas_archive
SELECT alert_type AS alertType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ht_alert GROUP BY alert_type ORDER BY alert_type

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(money), 0) AS totalAmount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN is_charged = 1 THEN paid_in ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paidAmount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN is_charged IS NULL OR is_charged = 0 THEN receivable ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unpaidAmount FROM pr_expense WHERE del_flag = '0'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalHouses, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN is_charged = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS chargedCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN is_charged IS NULL OR is_charged = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unpaidCount FROM pr_house WHERE del_flag = '0'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalDevices, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN signal_strength IS NOT NULL AND signal_strength > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS onlineDevices FROM ( SELECT signal_strength FROM pr_heat_valve_archive WHERE is_changed = 0 AND is_stop = 0 UNION ALL SELECT signal_strength FROM pr_heat_hot_archive WHERE is_changed = 0 AND is_stop = 0 UNION ALL SELECT signal_strength FROM pr_heat_temp_archive WHERE is_changed = 0 ) t
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount FROM pr_transaction_record WHERE status = 0 AND del_flag = '0'
